description: Comprehensive training for outdoor laser operations, FAA regulations, airspace safety, and emergency protocols. Features interactive simulations with official FAA aesthetic.

modules.title: Module 6.1: FAA Regulations for Laser Operations
modules.description: Interactive FAA Form 7140-1 simulator and review timeline with official aviation styling
learning_objectives: Complete FAA Form 7140-1 accurately for outdoor laser operations
Navigate the FAA review process timeline
Explain FAA regulatory authority under 49 U.S.C. § 40103
Apply 18 USC 39A criminal provisions

interactive_components.name: NOTAM Filing Simulator
interactive_components.description: Step-by-step Form 7140-1 walkthrough with field validation

interactive_components.name: FAA Review Timeline
interactive_components.description: Visual timeline of FAA review process with determination outcomes

modules.title: Module 6.2: Flight Zones & Safety Distances
modules.description: Interactive airspace diagram with flight zone visualizer and exposure limits
learning_objectives: Differentiate between LFZ, CFZ, SFZ, and NFZ classifications
Apply exposure thresholds to determine hazard distances
Explain three types of visual interference (distraction, glare, flashblindness)
Analyze flight phase vulnerabilities

interactive_components.name: Flight Zone Visualizer
interactive_components.description: Interactive airspace diagram with 4 zones and layer controls

modules.title: Module 6.3: Outdoor Hazard Calculations (SAE/ANSI)
modules.description: Comprehensive safety distance calculator with all FAA AC 70-1B equations
learning_objectives: Calculate NOHD for CW and pulsed lasers
Apply Visual Correction Factors (VCF)
Calculate SZED, CZED, and LFED
Convert slant range to horizontal/vertical distances
Apply MPE correction factors for near-IR

interactive_components.name: Safety Distance Calculator
interactive_components.description: NOHD, SZED, CZED, LFED calculator with real-time results

modules.title: Module 6.4: Securing Outdoor Laser Shows
modules.description: Pre-show security, weather protocols, observer placement, and emergency procedures
learning_objectives: Execute a complete pre-show security checklist
Make weather-related go/no-go decisions
Implement proper observer positioning protocols
Respond appropriately to unexpected events during shows

modules.title: Module 6.5: International Outdoor Standards
modules.description: Comparative analysis of international standards (FAA, EASA, CAA UK, ICAO)
learning_objectives: Compare FAA AC 70-1B with international standards
Calculate SAE measurement zones using proper formulas
Identify country-specific requirements
Apply visual correction factors for different wavelengths

modules.title: Module 6.6: NOTAM Procedures & Emergency Protocols
modules.description: Complete guide to NOTAM procedures, emergency response, and multi-agency coordination
learning_objectives: Complete FAA Form 7140-1 accurately
Interpret and issue proper NOTAMs
Execute emergency shutdown procedures during aircraft incursion
Coordinate with ATC and law enforcement during incidents

regulatory_references.title: Reporting of Laser Illumination of Aircraft
Aiming a laser pointer at an aircraft

design_features: Flight zone color coding (LFZ Red, CFZ Orange, SFZ Yellow, NFZ Green)
Zone diagram styling with radar/map aesthetics
author: UI/UX Agent - Course 6 Aviation Polish
version_notes: Applied FAA official aesthetic with blue/white styling, aviation warning colors, weather icons, map visualizations, and zone diagram styling
